title: Nocil South Asia Partners is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Nocil South Asia Partners is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Nocil South Asia Partners has an exciting opening for a Quality Control Engineer at our Chennai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Nocil South Asia Partners:
Nocil South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in GD&T

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nocil South Asia Partners!
